meals.name: Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Cheese & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: Soft-boiled egg in an egg cup beside two slices of sourdough toast with 20g Emmental cheese, small bowl of fresh raspberries on the side, natural morning light
prep_steps: Boil 14 eggs until soft-boiled (6 min), cool in ice bath, store in fridge
day_of_steps: Toast 2 slices sourdough (Diego) or 1.5 slices (Diana)
Top each slice with 10g Emmental
Peel one soft-boiled egg, place in egg cup
Serve with 100g raspberries (Diego) or 75g (Diana)

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: Small handful of roasted almonds in a bowl next to a sliced fresh apple, on a light wooden board, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Portion 30g almonds into a small bowl (Diego) or 22g (Diana)
Slice 1 apple, arrange on the side

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: Plate of herb-crusted grilled chicken breast beside roasted red peppers, zucchini, and cherry tomatoes with quinoa, drizzle of olive oil, lemon wedge, bright daylight from above
prep_steps: Marinate 600g chicken breasts in 2 tbsp olive oil, garlic, oregano, thyme, lemon juice for 30 min
Grill or pan-sear until internal temp 75°C; rest 5 min, slice into portions
Roast mixed vegetables (300g peppers, 250g zucchini, 200g cherry tomatoes) at 200°C for 25 min with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper
Cook 150g quinoa (dry) in salted water per package; cool and portion
day_of_steps: Retrieve grilled chicken, roasted veg, and cooked quinoa from fridge
Warm chicken briefly (2 min) in a pan if desired, or serve cold
Arrange 180g chicken (Diego) or 130g (Diana) on plate
Add 100g roasted veg (Diego) or 75g (Diana)
Add 80g quinoa (Diego) or 60g (Diana)
Dress with 1 tsp olive oil, squeeze of lemon, salt & pepper

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: Glass bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and toasted walnut pieces, natural light, minimalist presentation
prep_steps: Portion 600g Greek yogurt (0% fat) into 7 containers (one per day)
day_of_steps: Remove one container of pre-portioned yogurt from fridge
Top 170g yogurt (Diego) or 130g (Diana) with 20g walnuts and 80g blueberries (Diego) or 60g (Diana)

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon, Green Beans & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Baked white fish fillet on a bed of steamed green beans with roasted sweet potato wedges, lemon slice on top, fresh herbs, warm plated lighting
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Place 200g white fish fillet (Diego) or 150g (Diana) on parchment paper
Season with salt, pepper, fresh dill; squeeze lemon juice
Roast 15 min until flaky (internal temp 63°C)
Meanwhile, steam 150g green beans (Diego) or 115g (Diana) for 8 min until tender-crisp
Roast 150g diced sweet potato (Diego) or 120g (Diana) tossed in 0.5 tsp olive oil at 200°C for 15 min
Plate fish, beans, and sweet potato; drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana)

ingredients.item: White fish fillet (sea bass or cod)
White fish fillet (sea bass or cod)

meals.name: Smoked Salmon & Cream Cheese on Rye with Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: Two slices of dark rye bread topped with thin smoked salmon and 15g cream cheese, fresh dill garnish, kiwi fruit halves on the side, morning sunlight
day_of_steps: Toast 2 slices rye bread (Diego) or 1.5 slices (Diana) lightly
Spread 15g cream cheese (Diego) or 12g (Diana) on each slice
Layer 50g smoked salmon (Diego) or 40g (Diana) on top, garnish with fresh dill
Serve with 2 kiwis peeled and halved (Diego) or 1.5 kiwis (Diana)

meals.name: Cashews & Pear
meals.image_prompt: Small handful of roasted cashew nuts in a ceramic bowl beside a ripe pear cut into quarters, natural light on a wooden surface
day_of_steps: Portion 30g roasted cashews into a small bowl (Diego) or 22g (Diana)
Slice 1 pear into quarters, arrange beside nuts

meals.name: Asian Chicken Lettuce Cups with Sesame Bok Choy
meals.image_prompt: Crisp butter lettuce leaves filled with shredded cooked chicken in ginger-soy sauce, topped with sesame bok choy and shredded carrot, drizzle of sesame oil, fresh ginger garnish
prep_steps: Poach 600g chicken breasts in simmering water with ginger and soy sauce (20 min), cool and shred
Prepare sauce: 3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp grated ginger, 2 cloves minced garlic
Toss shredded chicken with sauce; refrigerate
Blanch 400g bok choy (2 min), drain, toss with 1 tsp sesame oil and sesame seeds; cool
day_of_steps: Remove chicken and bok choy from fridge
Arrange 4–5 butter lettuce leaves (Diego) or 3–4 (Diana) on plate
Fill each leaf with 100g sauced chicken (Diego) or 75g (Diana)
Top with 80g sesame bok choy (Diego) or 60g (Diana)
Garnish with shredded carrot (30g Diego / 20g Diana) and sesame seeds

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: Glass bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and toasted walnut pieces, natural light, minimalist presentation
day_of_steps: Remove one pre-portioned container of yogurt from fridge
Top 170g yogurt (Diego) or 130g (Diana) with 20g walnuts and 80g blueberries (Diego) or 60g (Diana)

meals.name: Pan-Seared Tuna Steak with Sesame Cucumber Salad & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: Seared tuna steak (rare centre) on a plate with chilled cucumber salad (sesame-vinegar dressing), brown rice on the side, sesame seeds, lemon wedge
day_of_steps: Cook 100g brown rice (Diego) or 80g (Diana) per package instructions (15 min); set aside
Pat dry 200g tuna steak (Diego) or 150g (Diana); season with salt & pepper
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in pan over high heat; sear tuna 2 min each side for rare centre
Rest tuna 3 min, slice if desired
Assemble cucumber salad: 150g cucumber diced (Diego) or 110g (Diana), 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 0.5 tsp sesame oil, 1 tsp sesame seeds
Plate tuna, rice, and cucumber salad; garnish with fresh ginger and extra sesame seeds

meals.name: Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Cheese & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: Soft-boiled egg in an egg cup beside two slices of sourdough toast with 20g Emmental cheese, small bowl of fresh raspberries on the side, natural morning light
day_of_steps: Toast 2 slices sourdough (Diego) or 1.5 slices (Diana)
Top each slice with 10g Emmental
Retrieve one pre-cooked soft-boiled egg from fridge, place in egg cup
Serve with 100g raspberries (Diego) or 75g (Diana)

meals.name: Pistachios & Peach
meals.image_prompt: Shelled pistachios in a small glass bowl beside a fresh, ripe peach cut into quarters, natural outdoor light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g roasted pistachios into a small bowl (Diego) or 18g (Diana)
Slice 1 peach into quarters, remove pit

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets
meals.image_prompt: Five herbed turkey meatballs on a bed of warm brown lentil salad with roasted beet chunks, topped with fresh parsley, drizzle of balsamic vinegar, warm lighting
prep_steps: Mix 600g ground turkey with 40g breadcrumbs, 1 egg, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp cumin, salt & pepper
Form into 20 meatballs (~30g each); bake at 190°C for 15 min until 75°C internal temp
Cook 150g brown lentils per package (25 min); cool
Roast 400g diced beets at 200°C for 25 min; cool
Prepare lentil salad: toss cooled lentils with 200g diced cucumber, roasted beets, 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar, 1 tbsp olive oil, fresh parsley
day_of_steps: Retrieve meatballs and lentil-beet salad from fridge
Warm meatballs in oven at 160°C for 3 min (or serve cold)
Plate 5–6 meatballs (Diego) or 4–5 (Diana) on a bed of lentil salad (150g Diego / 110g Diana)
Drizzle with extra balsamic vinegar and fresh parsley

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Asparagus & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Pan-seared salmon fillet with crispy skin on a bed of roasted asparagus spears and diced sweet potato, lemon butter sauce drizzle, fresh dill, warm plating light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Toss 200g diced sweet potato (Diego) or 160g (Diana) in 1 tsp olive oil, salt, pepper; roast 15 min
Trim 200g asparagus (Diego) or 150g (Diana); toss with 0.5 tsp olive oil; add to sweet potato; roast 8 more min
Pat dry 200g salmon fillet (Diego) or 150g (Diana); season with salt & pepper
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in pan over medium-high heat; sear salmon skin-side down 4 min, flip, cook 3 min until 63°C internal temp
Plate salmon, asparagus, and sweet potato; top with squeeze of lemon and fresh dill

meals.name: Mexican-Style Chicken with Black Beans, Peppers & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: Grilled seasoned chicken slices on a bed of cumin-spiced black beans and brown rice with roasted red peppers and diced tomato, lime wedge, fresh cilantro, vibrant natural light
prep_steps: Marinate 500g chicken breasts in lime juice, cumin, paprika, garlic, and 1 tbsp olive oil for 30 min
Grill or pan-sear chicken until 75°C internal temp; slice into strips
Heat 1 tsp olive oil; sauté 150g diced bell peppers (5 min), set aside
Cook 120g black beans (dry weight converted) per package; toss with cumin, lime juice, salt, pepper
Cook 120g brown rice per package instructions
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of poultry only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 6. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Retrieve grilled chicken, cooked beans, peppers, and brown rice from fridge
Warm chicken and beans briefly (2 min) in pan if desired
Arrange 160g chicken (Diego) or 120g (Diana) on plate
Add 80g black beans (Diego) or 60g (Diana), 70g roasted peppers (Diego) or 50g (Diana), 70g brown rice (Diego) or 55g (Diana)
Top with 30g diced fresh tomato, squeeze of lime, and fresh cilantro
meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of poultry only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 6. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

meals.name: Baked Cod with Capers, Roasted Carrots & White Beans
meals.image_prompt: Baked white fish fillet topped with capers and parsley butter, surrounded by roasted carrot batons and creamy white beans, fresh lemon, warm plating light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Place 220g cod fillet (Diego) or 170g (Diana) on parchment paper
Top with 1 tbsp capers, squeeze of lemon, fresh parsley, salt & pepper
Roast 15 min until flaky (internal temp 63°C)
Meanwhile, toss 180g diced carrots (Diego) or 140g (Diana) in 0.5 tsp olive oil; roast at 200°C for 15 min
Heat 100g cooked white beans (Diego) or 80g (Diana) gently with 1 tsp olive oil, garlic, fresh herbs (5 min)
Plate fish, carrots, and beans; drizzle with 0.5 tsp olive oil (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana)
